Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}Oh, it's you. I'm helping Akihiko with his studies at the moment.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Would you care to join us? I believe we can be of some help to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4130 0 0}I see. Sounds like you're confident about the exams.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, we'll likely be here all day, if you change your mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4136 0 0}What's the matter? Did you want to study together after all?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Did you want to study together after all?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}These people already have plans, so they can't go tonight:[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}You want to go to Tartarus? I hope you aren't pushing yourself, especially with exams soon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}There are also those of us who can't go today. However, if you truly wish to go, I won't stop you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Good decision. It would be better to concentrate on your studies today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Temperance
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Зараз Аркана Помірності[n]може допомогти мені розвиватися ще більше...[n]{f 1 1}
